name: typewriter-rotator
title: Typewriter Rotator
description: Animation primitive — cycles through a list of phrases, typing each one character-by-character with a blinking cursor, pausing, deleting, then typing the next. Inline span — drops into any headline to give it a rotating dynamic line that demonstrates multiple value propositions without taking up vertical space. Classic AF landing-page hero pattern. Per af-brand-doctrine: the rotation across Handwerk types is a RELATE-module signal — AF serves breadth, not one persona. Anti-Orthodoxy vs lead portals that funnel a single offering. Used by kundenstimmen-page hero headline. Configurable typing/deleting speed, pause durations, cursor character + blink rate, loop on/off. ARIA-live='polite' for screen readers.
